subcodes.title: Madinatu't-Tawhid (the City of Unity)
subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of the Book, whose signs have been set forth with wondrous originality, free from all crookedness, dwelling upon the signs of God, and serving as guidance and light [3.5s]... ...Beware, O believers in the Unity of God, lest ye be tempted to make any distinction between any of the Manifestations of His Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الکتاب فصلت آیاته بدعیا غیر ذی عوج علی آیات الله و هدی و نوری
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @absolute freedom; independence of God
